## Summary

Describe the problem and the intended outcome.

## Changes

- List the important implementation changes.

## Testing

- List the commands and manual checks performed.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots when the UI changed. Otherwise, write `Not applicable`.

## Deployment Or Configuration Impact

Describe migrations, environment variables, hosting changes, or write `None`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend tests pass when backend code changed
- [ ] Frontend lint and production build pass when frontend code changed
- [ ] Docker build implications were considered
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets, environment files, generated outputs, or IDE files were committed
